◎简　　介  

　　本纪录片将带我们亲历野生动物在季节极限下的生活。领略它们在零下40度采取的保护措施 ，经历狂怒的森林火灾或防治权利滋生……Yellowstone Is No Ordinary Wilderness. It Has The Distinction Of Being The Worlds’ First National Park And Is A Lost World Of Vast Plains, Lush Meadows And Endless Forests Defended On All Sides By Towering Mountains. It Is The Most Extensive Thermal Area On Earth With More Than 10,000 Boiling Springs, Fumaroles And B...
